title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
